selection_dossier.core_question: OpenAI推理之父所说的“AI满血版本”具体指什么，其成本门槛对普通技术人意味着什么？
selection_dossier.why_this_topic_matters: AI能力快速提升，但API调用成本居高不下，普通技术人、小团队是否被排除在“满血AI”之外，直接影响技术选型、工具链和职业判断。
fact_summary: OpenAI推理之父（可能指Noam Brown或相关研究员）言论引发行业讨论，称“满血AI”成本极高。
OpenAI o1 API定价：输入$15/1M tokens，输出$60/1M tokens（来源：artificialanalysis.ai）。
OpenAI o1-pro API定价：输入$150/1M tokens，输出$600/1M tokens（来源：Hacker News）。
o3模型降价80%后，定价与GPT-4.1 mini持平：输入$0.40/1M tokens，输出$1.60/1M tokens（来源：OpenAI社区）。
DeepSeek R1等开源模型API价格远低于OpenAI推理模型（来源：多家对比文章）。
OpenAI API有速率限制，Tier 1仅30K TPM（来源：OpenAI社区）。
selection_dossier.persona_discussion_question: 如果满血AI的API调用成本是当前主流模型的10倍以上，我作为独立开发者或小团队，是否应该继续押注OpenAI生态，还是转向更便宜的开源模型？

research_evidence.title: Estimating costs of O1 queries - API - OpenAI Developer Community
research_evidence.query: OpenAI o1 cost per token real world application
research_evidence.fetched_text: Pricing page gives the price per token, but the total tokens produced during user message is unknown because output and reasoning tokens from each step are billed as well. I am looking for guidance or experience on what is the range of tokens produced over the whole reasoning sequence. Perhaps I am misunderstanding the point/concern but for a given API request, the context window is limited to 128k tokens, shared between input, reasoning and output tokens. I agree that depending on how many output tokens you aim for, it could still get fairly expensive but if I am not mistaken just under $5 should be the maximum for a single request under o1-preview. So the OP is wondering if there is at least a way to estimate the final cost given the initial prompt and not knowing how many thought prompts and thus tokens will be billed in the end.

research_evidence.fetched_text: # Increased gpt-5 and gpt-5-mini rate limits. gpt-5 and gpt-5-mini API rate limits are now more than doubled for these tiers:. Tier 1: 30K → 500K TPM (1.5M batch). Tier 1: 200K → 500K (5M batch). Would be also wonderful if OpenAI could find their way to apply the tier 1 increase all the way down the model lines, as 30k is at the level of *single calls failing* - and no API mechanism other than the limiter itself is aware of how low this is, so you can get failures you have to pay for with internal tool iteration. Tier 1 having 1 / 1000th the rate capability per minute as delivered to others is kind of silly. | How to Increase GPT-4o Mini Usage Limits (TPM/TPD)? material_pack.core_question: OpenAI推理之父所说的“AI满血版本”具体指什么，其成本门槛对普通技术人意味着什么？
material_pack.why_this_topic_matters: AI能力快速提升，但API调用成本居高不下，普通技术人、小团队是否被排除在“满血AI”之外，直接影响技术选型、工具链和职业判断。
fact_summary: OpenAI推理之父（可能指Noam Brown或相关研究员）言论引发行业讨论，称“满血AI”成本极高。
OpenAI o1 API定价：输入$15/1M tokens，输出$60/1M tokens（来源：artificialanalysis.ai）。
OpenAI o1-pro API定价：输入$150/1M tokens，输出$600/1M tokens（来源：Hacker News）。
o3模型降价80%后，定价与GPT-4.1 mini持平：输入$0.40/1M tokens，输出$1.60/1M tokens（来源：OpenAI社区）。
DeepSeek R1等开源模型API价格远低于OpenAI推理模型（来源：多家对比文章）。
OpenAI API有速率限制，Tier 1仅30K TPM（来源：OpenAI社区）。
material_pack.persona_discussion_question: 如果满血AI的API调用成本是当前主流模型的10倍以上，我作为独立开发者或小团队，是否应该继续押注OpenAI生态，还是转向更便宜的开源模型？
material_pack.old_flower_stance: 不盲目追高成本模型，先算账：你的应用场景是否真的需要满血推理能力？成本能否转嫁给客户？开源模型是否已够用？

research_evidence.fetched_text: Pricing page gives the price per token, but the total tokens produced during user message is unknown because output and reasoning tokens from each step are billed as well. I am looking for guidance or experience on what is the range of tokens produced over the whole reasoning sequence. Perhaps I am misunderstanding the point/concern but for a given API request, the context window is limited to 128k tokens, shared between input, reasoning and output tokens. I agree that depending on how many output tokens you aim for, it could still get fairly expensive but if I am not mistaken just under $5 should be the maximum for a single request under o1-preview. So the OP is wondering if there is at least a way to estimate the final cost given the initial prompt and not knowing how many thought prompts and thus tokens will be billed in the end.

research_evidence.query: OpenAI API usage limits rate limits 2025
research_evidence.fetched_text: # Increased gpt-5 and gpt-5-mini rate limits. gpt-5 and gpt-5-mini API rate limits are now more than doubled for these tiers:. Tier 1: 30K → 500K TPM (1.5M batch). Tier 1: 200K → 500K (5M batch). Would be also wonderful if OpenAI could find their way to apply the tier 1 increase all the way down the model lines, as 30k is at the level of *single calls failing* - and no API mechanism other than the limiter itself is aware of how low this is, so you can get failures you have to pay for with internal tool iteration. Tier 1 having 1 / 1000th the rate capability per minute as delivered to others is kind of silly. | How to Increase GPT-4o Mini Usage Limits (TPM/TPD)? API gpt-4 , api , rate-limit | 5 | 3258 | September 14, 2023 |. | How can I increase the api request rate of gpt-4 API gpt-4 | 5 | 1403 | January 3, 2024 |.

verdict.label: 可选
verdict.reason: 质量闸提示缺口：核心事实没有来源：'OpenAI推理之父'具体身份和言论原文缺失，无法验证。

selection_dossier.core_question: OpenAI推理之父所说的“AI满血版本”具体指什么，其成本门槛对普通技术人意味着什么？
selection_dossier.why_this_topic_matters: AI能力快速提升，但API调用成本居高不下，普通技术人、小团队是否被排除在“满血AI”之外，直接影响技术选型、工具链和职业判断。
fact_summary: OpenAI推理之父（可能指Noam Brown或相关研究员）言论引发行业讨论，称“满血AI”成本极高。
OpenAI o1 API定价：输入$15/1M tokens，输出$60/1M tokens（来源：artificialanalysis.ai）。
OpenAI o1-pro API定价：输入$150/1M tokens，输出$600/1M tokens（来源：Hacker News）。
o3模型降价80%后，定价与GPT-4.1 mini持平：输入$0.40/1M tokens，输出$1.60/1M tokens（来源：OpenAI社区）。
DeepSeek R1等开源模型API价格远低于OpenAI推理模型（来源：多家对比文章）。
OpenAI API有速率限制，Tier 1仅30K TPM（来源：OpenAI社区）。
selection_dossier.persona_discussion_question: 如果满血AI的API调用成本是当前主流模型的10倍以上，我作为独立开发者或小团队，是否应该继续押注OpenAI生态，还是转向更便宜的开源模型？
selection_dossier.old_flower_stance: 不盲目追高成本模型，先算账：你的应用场景是否真的需要满血推理能力？成本能否转嫁给客户？开源模型是否已够用？

audience_fit.why_interested: 核心技术人关注成本与性能权衡；商业读者关注投资回报；泛兴趣读者被“满血AI”概念吸引。
audience_fit.reader_risk: 成本数据可能过时，需标注数据时间点。

mass_interest_hook.why_non_technical_people_may_click: 标题暗示AI能力与普通人无关，引发好奇：为什么“你没钱见”？
mass_interest_hook.story_seed: 一个独立开发者用o1-pro处理代码库，一次查询花费数百美元，而用开源模型几乎免费。
mass_interest_hook.do_not_overhype: 不要声称“AI只属于大公司”，要强调成本与价值的权衡。

topic_tension.conflict_point: AI能力提升与成本门槛之间的矛盾：谁在推动“满血”叙事，谁被排除在外。
topic_tension.debate_question: 这笔账普通技术人还能不能算得过来，还是只适合少数人？
topic_tension.why_people_would_comment: 读者可以围绕成本、规则、风险、机会真假或自己是否遇到类似情况发表观点。
topic_tension.traffic_risk: 有讨论空间，但标题不能夸大，必须用证据接住冲突。

timeline: 2024年12月：OpenAI发布o1模型，定价$15/$60 per 1M tokens。
2025年3月：OpenAI发布o1-pro API，定价$150/$600 per 1M tokens。
2025年：o3模型降价80%，定价与GPT-4.1 mini持平。
2025年：DeepSeek R1等开源模型持续降价，性能接近o1。

research_evidence.fetched_text: Pricing page gives the price per token, but the total tokens produced during user message is unknown because output and reasoning tokens from each step are billed as well. I am looking for guidance or experience on what is the range of tokens produced over the whole reasoning sequence. Perhaps I am misunderstanding the point/concern but for a given API request, the context window is limited to 128k tokens, shared between input, reasoning and output tokens. I agree that depending on how many output tokens you aim for, it could still get fairly expensive but if I am not mistaken just under $5 should be the maximum for a single request under o1-preview. So the OP is wondering if there is at least a way to estimate the final cost given the initial prompt and not knowing how many thought prompts and thus tokens will be billed in the end.

Would be also wonderful if OpenAI could find their way to apply the tier 1 increase all the way down the model lines, as 30k is at the level of *single calls failing* - and no API mechanism other than the limiter itself is aware of how low this is, so you can get failures you have to pay for with internal tool iteration. Tier 1 having 1 / 1000th the rate capability per minute as delivered to others is kind of silly. | How to Increase GPT-4o Mini Usage Limits (TPM/TPD)? material_pack.core_question: OpenAI推理之父所说的“AI满血版本”具体指什么，其成本门槛对普通技术人意味着什么？
material_pack.why_this_topic_matters: AI能力快速提升，但API调用成本居高不下，普通技术人、小团队是否被排除在“满血AI”之外，直接影响技术选型、工具链和职业判断。
fact_summary: OpenAI推理之父（可能指Noam Brown或相关研究员）言论引发行业讨论，称“满血AI”成本极高。
OpenAI o1 API定价：输入$15/1M tokens，输出$60/1M tokens（来源：artificialanalysis.ai）。
OpenAI o1-pro API定价：输入$150/1M tokens，输出$600/1M tokens（来源：Hacker News）。
o3模型降价80%后，定价与GPT-4.1 mini持平：输入$0.40/1M tokens，输出$1.60/1M tokens（来源：OpenAI社区）。
DeepSeek R1等开源模型API价格远低于OpenAI推理模型（来源：多家对比文章）。
OpenAI API有速率限制，Tier 1仅30K TPM（来源：OpenAI社区）。
material_pack.persona_discussion_question: 如果满血AI的API调用成本是当前主流模型的10倍以上，我作为独立开发者或小团队，是否应该继续押注OpenAI生态，还是转向更便宜的开源模型？
material_pack.old_flower_stance: 不盲目追高成本模型，先算账：你的应用场景是否真的需要满血推理能力？成本能否转嫁给客户？开源模型是否已够用？

research_evidence.query: OpenAI o1 cost per token real world application
research_evidence.fetched_text: Pricing page gives the price per token, but the total tokens produced during user message is unknown because output and reasoning tokens from each step are billed as well. I am looking for guidance or experience on what is the range of tokens produced over the whole reasoning sequence. Perhaps I am misunderstanding the point/concern but for a given API request, the context window is limited to 128k tokens, shared between input, reasoning and output tokens. I agree that depending on how many output tokens you aim for, it could still get fairly expensive but if I am not mistaken just under $5 should be the maximum for a single request under o1-preview. So the OP is wondering if there is at least a way to estimate the final cost given the initial prompt and not knowing how many thought prompts and thus tokens will be billed in the end.

Tier 1: 200K → 500K (5M batch). Would be also wonderful if OpenAI could find their way to apply the tier 1 increase all the way down the model lines, as 30k is at the level of *single calls failing* - and no API mechanism other than the limiter itself is aware of how low this is, so you can get failures you have to pay for with internal tool iteration. Tier 1 having 1 / 1000th the rate capability per minute as delivered to others is kind of silly. | How to Increase GPT-4o Mini Usage Limits (TPM/TPD)?
